{"rationale":"4/8: the description is well-structured and the ACs name concrete tests and a wired-in assertion, but the title is not clearly imperative/subsystem-scoped, the bead does not explicitly list deps or state \"No deps.\", and the ACs omit the required `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./\u003cpkg\u003e/...` plus `lefthook run pre-commit` verification.","score":4,"suggested_fixes":["Rewrite the title as an imperative, subsystem-scoped one-liner, e.g. \"bead: add OperationApplier fallback and bead invariants\".","Add a `DEPS` section or explicitly state `No deps.` so the execution contract is complete.","Add acceptance criteria that name the package-level `go test` command and `lefthook run pre-commit` pass condition."],"waivers_applied":[]}

{"rationale":"The bead has a solid problem statement, file-backed root cause, named tests, wired-in assertions, and good labels, but it still misses several lint requirements: the title is not imperative/subsystem-scoped, dependencies are not stated as a list or `No deps.`, the acceptance criteria omit the required `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./\u003cpkg\u003e/...` and `lefthook run pre-commit` checks, and the prompt is not fully self-contained without explicit verification commands.","score":4,"suggested_fixes":["Rewrite the title into an imperative, one-line subsystem scope, e.g. `\u003csubsystem\u003e: add OperationApplier fallback and bead invariants`.","Add a `deps` section or an explicit `No deps.` statement.","Append acceptance items that name the package-specific `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./\u003cpkg\u003e/...` command and `lefthook run pre-commit`.","Keep the current test names, but make the bead fully self-contained by stating the verification commands directly in acceptance so a sub-agent can execute without asking."],"waivers_applied":[]}

{"rationale":"The bead is mostly execution-ready: the description has PROBLEM/ROOT CAUSE with file:line anchors plus PROPOSED FIX and NON-SCOPE, the acceptance criteria are numbered and include specific Test* symbols, and the scope is concrete enough for a sub-agent. It misses the lint rubric on title clarity, the required `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./\u003cpkg\u003e/...` and `lefthook run pre-commit` verification commands, and an explicit `deps`/`No deps.` declaration.","score":5,"suggested_fixes":["Rewrite the title as an imperative, subsystem-named action (for example: `Implement Store.Apply and JSONLBackend OperationApplier support`).","Add a final acceptance item with the package-level test command `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./internal/bead/...` (or the exact target package for this slice).","Add a final acceptance item with `lefthook run pre-commit`.","Add an explicit `deps` field or state `No deps.` in the bead body/metadata."],"waivers_applied":[]}
